creator: fjwcash@gmail.com
text:
www/dansguardian has already been converted over to use non-prefixed OPTIONS.

www/dansguardian-devel is marked as ignore, as there is not currently
a devel version of DansGuardian available.  When one is made
available, then the Makefile can be updated.

No one should be using www/dansguardian-devel at this time.

-- 
Freddie Cash
fjwcash@gmail.com
